publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

ead.archdesc:
======= RMA02101Alpha Delta Phi, Cornell chapter records37-4-2101Compiled by Julia ParkerDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
August 20082B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:

This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Alpha Delta Phi, Cornell chapter records
Alpha Delta Phi. Cornell Chapter
Eells, Samuel.
37-4-2101
9.1 cubic feet. 9.1 cubic feet.
1872-2005. Computer Media, Correspondence, Financial Records, Manuscripts, Publications Alpha Delta Phi ephemera. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 22 - folder 1 ======= 22 - folder 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2077713
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Julia Parker
Date completed:
May 2004
EAD encoding:
Julia Parker, May 2004
Date modified:
RMC Staff, July 2016
SERIES LIST
Series I. Correspondence
Series II. Printed Materials
Series III. Fraternal Documents
Series IV. G. Lauriston Walsh Files, President of Alpha Delta Phi Alumni Association
Series IV. Photographs and Negatives
Series IV. Other
Cite As:
Alpha Delta Phi, Cornell chapter records, #37-4-2101. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Not all the material in the collection is covered by this guide.
Scope and content
Secretary's minutes, 1897-1975; constitution and bylaws, with list of members, 1878-1926; correspondence and documents about the sale of property and the settlement of the Martin McVoy, Jr. estate, 1963-1988, and seal imprinter. Also includes "Catalogue of the Alpha Delta Phi, 1932-1956"; "The Cayugan," 1964, 1966; brochures containing messages from the faculty advisor and president, 1963-1966; initiation programs, 1964, 1965; membership roster, 1965; and photographs. Also the files of G. Lauriston Walsh as alumni association president regarding the operation and events of the fraternity.
Scope and content
Also, inscribed copy of Memorial of Samuel Eells, the founder of Alpha Delta Phi, 1873, and "Oration Delivered Before the Biennial Convention of Alpha Delta Phi Society... by Samuel Eells," 1939.
Scope and content
Alpha Delta Phi Song Book, 1912.
Scope and content
Printed song sheets with songs by Oscar L. Taylor (Class of 1881), Professor William Rufus Perkins (Hudson, 1868), William Seymour Edwards (Class of 1879), and Theodore Luqueer Mead (Class of 1877).
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to the written permission of the President of the Alumni Board of Directors or his designee. Library staff will first notify the President of any requests.
Biographical / Historical
The Cornell chapter of Alpha Delta Phi was established at Cornell University in 1869. In 1929, the original fraternity house burned in a fire.
Related Materials
See also: Theodore Luqueer Mead scrapbook, #37-5-4452, for class photographs, house photographs, and printed material, circa 1869-1900.
Initiations (into trades, societies, etc.) Greek letter societies. Cayugan. Cornell University -- : Societies, etc.

RestrictedSeries V. Photographs and negativesGroup portraits and 2 unidentified negatives1872-195531-54Group and composite photographs, fraternity house and house fire, campus buildings including Rice Hall, Teagle Hall and Observatory1967-20004Group photographs and fraternity house192619395Photograph album, including road renovations, Howie Schaffer, group and misc.1880's1900's20016Photographs1923-20037Group photon.d.81Unidentified portraitsn.d.82-8Individual portraits1900-190789-27Group photographn.d.838Group photographn.d.839Empty photo album - photos removed and placed in Box 89Alpha Delta Phi Photo Album, assembled by William P. Abbott1875-188010
Scope and Contents
Contains photos of faculty during the time, including Ezra Cornell, A. D. White, Willard Fiske, Goldwin Smith; Cornell crew team of 1875 and Taughannock Falls prior to rock fallAlpha Delta Phi Photo Album, assembled by Richard H. Cobb1905-191011
Scope and Contents
Contains photos of fraternity house including interior shots and the fire that destroyed the Chi Psi house, the "goat house", other miscellaneous photos candid/group shots and canon fire on campusPhotos of initiation weekend 2004 and misc.1970's-1990's2004121Portrait album of members188313Photos of fraternity house and misc.1800's-1900's14Photos of Charles Kendall Adamsn.d.153Group portraitsn.d.154-9Group portraits1872-1881153Copy of a photograph of University School of Cleveland class, a prep school for many Alpha Delta Phi members1899840Series VI. OtherAlpha Delta Phi embosserMU-20462Sketches of fraternity house19805The Face behind the Mask, by John Minahan1986122 CDs containing 2 photos of paintings by Louis Agassiz Fuertes: "Owl" (CD-1960) and Duck Marsh Scene (CD-1961)122
Existence and Location of Originals
These paintings hung in the fraternity, but were given to the Laboratory of Ornithology in September of 2010.Song books and CD of songs (CD-1962)1888-1994123Decals and 1940's book plates124Alpha Delta Phi at Cornell, Inc.19722004125Dinner for James E. RestrictedSeries V. Photographs and negativesGroup portraits and 2 unidentified negatives1872-195531-54Group and composite photographs, fraternity house and house fire, campus buildings including Rice Hall, Teagle Hall and Observatory1967-20004Group photographs and fraternity house192619395Photograph album, including road renovations, Howie Schaffer, group and misc.1880's1900's20016Photographs1923-20037Group photon.d.81Unidentified portraitsn.d.82-8Individual portraits1900-190789-27Group photographn.d.838Group photographn.d.839Empty photo album - photos removed and placed in Box 89Alpha Delta Phi Photo Album, assembled by William P. Abbott1875-188010
Scope and Contents
Contains photos of faculty during the time, including Ezra Cornell, A. D. White, Willard Fiske, Goldwin Smith; Cornell crew team of 1875 and Taughannock Falls prior to rock fallAlpha Delta Phi Photo Album, assembled by Richard H. Cobb1905-191011
Scope and Contents
Contains photos of fraternity house including interior shots and the fire that destroyed the Chi Psi house, the "goat house", other miscellaneous photos candid/group shots and canon fire on campusPhotos of initiation weekend 2004 and misc.1970's-1990's2004121Portrait album of members188313Photos of fraternity house and misc.1800's-1900's14Photos of Charles Kendall Adamsn.d.153Group portraitsn.d.154-9Group portraits1872-1881153Copy of a photograph of University School of Cleveland class, a prep school for many Alpha Delta Phi members1899840Series VI. OtherAlpha Delta Phi embosserMU-20462Sketches of fraternity house19805The Face behind the Mask, by John Minahan1986122 CDs containing 2 photos of paintings by Louis Agassiz Fuertes: "Owl" (CD-1960) and Duck Marsh Scene (CD-1961)122
Existence and Location of Originals
These paintings hung in the fraternity, but were given to the Laboratory of Ornithology in September of 2010.Song books and CD of songs (CD-1962)1888-1994123Decals and 1940's book plates124Alpha Delta Phi at Cornell, Inc.19722004125Dinner for James E. Rice, Jr. and his 1926 certificate of membership1968126Song bookn.d.13Annual initiation program1926151Reunion invitation1876152 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
